word: G4865 - συναγωνίζομαι - synagōnízomai - soon-ag-o-nid'-zom-ahee - Strive together with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Strive together with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to strive together with one, to help one in striving
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and G75; to struggle in company with, that is, (figuratively) to be a partner (assistant): - strive together with.
